ExecuteSQLTask.Name: EST_ValidateRI
ExecuteSQLTask.SqlStatement: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Violations FROM [gold].[FactSales] AS f WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [gold].[DimDate] d WHERE d.DateKey = f.OrderDateKey) OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [gold].[DimCustomer] c WHERE c.CustomerKey = f.CustomerKey) OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [gold].[DimProduct] p WHERE p.ProductKey = f.ProductKey AND p.IsCurrent = 1) OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [gold].[DimTerritory] t WHERE t.TerritoryKey = f.TerritoryKey) OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [gold].[DimSalesPerson] s WHERE s.SalesPersonKey = f.SalesPersonKey);

ExecuteSQLTask.Name: EST_AuditGoldLoad
ExecuteSQLTask.SqlStatement: IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.etl_audit_gold', N'U') IS NULL BEGIN CREATE TABLE [dbo].[etl_audit_gold]( [audit_id] BIGINT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, [run_time] DATETIME2(3) NOT NULL, [duration_ms] BIGINT NOT NULL, [fact_rows] BIGINT NOT NULL, [ri_violations] INT NOT NULL ); END INSERT INTO [dbo].[etl_audit_gold] ([run_time],[duration_ms],[fact_rows],[ri_violations]) VALUES ( SYSUTCDATETIME(), DATEDIFF_BIG(MILLISECOND, ?, SYSUTCDATETIME()), (SELECT COUNT_BIG(*) FROM [gold].[FactSales]), ? );
